onus.onu:
${onu\-name} <#if usage?has_content && usage = "template"> template-common:node-template-usage </#if> <#if usage?has_content && usage = "template-overrule" && onu\-template?has_content> template-common:node-from-template-usage
${onu\-template} <#if mib\-upload\-behavior\-value?has_content> nokia-sdan-mib-upload-behavior-types-mounted:${mib\-upload\-behavior\-value} </#if>
</#if> <#if usage?has_content = false || usage != "template-overrule">
<#if mib\-upload\-behavior\-value?has_content> nokia-sdan-mib-upload-behavior-types-mounted:${mib\-upload\-behavior\-value} </#if>
</#if>
